modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook login prompts but then freezes and won't respond.

full_description_text:  
- Cuando intento iniciar sesión en Outlook, aparece un cuadro para ingresar mi correo.  
- No puedo continuar porque Outlook no responde.  
- No puedo configurar Outlook en mi computadora.
short_description: Outlook login prompts but then freezes and won't respond.
description:
- Cuando intento iniciar sesión en Outlook, aparece un cuadro para ingresar mi correo.  
- No puedo continuar porque Outlook no responde.  
- No puedo configurar Outlook en mi computadora.
